title: Designing a Taxonomy for Classifying Open-Source Software Repositories
scenario: Develop a taxonomy to classify open-source software repositories based on their programming languages, libraries, and frameworks. The taxonomy should be able to handle complex relationships between these attributes and enable efficient querying and filtering of repositories.
constraints: Must use a hierarchical approach to organize the taxonomy

evaluationCriteria.description: The taxonomy should accurately represent the relationships between programming languages, libraries, and frameworks.
The hierarchical approach should be correctly implemented to organize the taxonomy.
The taxonomy should enable efficient querying and filtering of repositories based on the attributes.
The taxonomy should be easy to read and understand.
